title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Max Life Insurance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Max Life Insurance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Max Life Insurance in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Max Life Insurance:
Max Life Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Life Insurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
